item.title: mark_complete sprint diff stats use HEAD~1..HEAD, missing changes from multi-commit sprints
item.intent: Sprint archive stats (filesChanged, linesAdded, linesRemoved) accurately reflect all changes made during the sprint, not just the final commit.
item.description: In mark_complete(), git diff --shortstat HEAD~1 HEAD is used to compute sprint stats. This only captures the last commit's diff. If a developer makes multiple commits during a sprint (common with maturity protocol), the earlier commits' changes are excluded. The archive record then shows inaccurate metrics. Fix: use git diff --shortstat $AISHORE_BASE_BRANCH HEAD to capture all sprint changes since branching.
steps: In mark_complete(), replace 'git diff --shortstat HEAD~1 HEAD' with 'git diff --shortstat "$AISHORE_BASE_BRANCH" HEAD'
Guard against empty AISHORE_BASE_BRANCH: fall back to HEAD~1 HEAD if it is unset
Verify with a sprint that produces multiple developer commits: all file changes appear in the archive record
acceptanceCriteria: Archive record filesChanged/linesAdded/linesRemoved reflects total diff between base branch and feature branch HEAD, not just the last commit
Falls back gracefully (stats = 0) if AISHORE_BASE_BRANCH is unset or git diff fails
